source:
'use client' import Link from 'next/link' import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation' import { useState } from 'react' import { ArrowRight, Bell, CreditCard, Eye, Gift, Heart, MapPin, ShieldCheck, ShoppingBag, Sparkles, Package, LogOut, RefreshCcw, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react' import type { AccountOverviewData } from '@/lib/account/types' type AccountClientProps = { overview: AccountOverviewData } export default function AccountClient({ overview }: AccountClientProps) { const router = useRouter() const [isLoggingOut, setIsLoggingOut] = useState(false) const [error, setError] = useState('') const formatCurrency = (value: number) => new Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'INR', maximumFractionDigits: 0, }).format(value) const loyaltyProgress = Math.min(100, Math.max(0, overview.profile.loyaltyProgress)) const stats = [ { label: 'Total Orders', value: overview.stats.totalOrders.toLocaleString('en-IN') }, { label: 'Total Saved', value: formatCurrency(overview.stats.totalSaved) }, { label: 'Loyalty Points', value: overview.stats.loyaltyPoints.toLocaleString('en-IN') }, { label: 'Active Offers', value: overview.stats.activeOffers.toLocaleString('en-IN') }, { label: 'Wallet Balance', value: formatCurrency(overview.stats.walletBalance) }, ] const activeOrders = overview.activeOrders const wishlistItems = overview.wishlist const recommendations = overview.recommendations const recentlyViewed = overview.recentlyViewed const handleLogout = async () => { try { setIsLoggingOut(true) setError('') const response = await fetch('/api/auth/logout', { method: 'POST', }) if (!response.ok) { throw new Error('Failed to logout') } router.push('/') } catch (err) { const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to logout' setError(message) setIsLoggingOut(false) } } return (
{/* Welcome Banner */}
{/* Background Decoration */}
{overview.profile.tier} Member

Account Overview

Hello, {overview.profile.name}

{overview.profile.avatarUrl ? ( // eslint-disable-next-line @next/next/no-img-element ) : ( overview.profile.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase() )}
Edit Profile
Loyalty Progress {loyaltyProgress}%

Current: {overview.stats.loyaltyPoints} pts Next Tier: {Math.max(0, 1000 - overview.stats.loyaltyPoints)} pts

Continue Shopping
{/* Stats Grid */}
{stats.map((stat, i) => (

{stat.label}

{stat.value}

))}
{error && (
{error}
)} {/* Main Content Grid */}
{/* Left Column (Orders) */}

Active Orders

Real-time status of your recent purchases.

{activeOrders.length > 0 ? (
{activeOrders.map((order) => (

Order #{order.id}

ETA: {order.eta || 'Calculating...'}

{order.status}
Details Track
))}
) : (

Ready for your next drop?

You don't have any active orders right now. Let's find something new.

Shop Collection
)}

Recently Viewed

Pick up right where you left off.

{recentlyViewed.length > 0 ? (
{recentlyViewed.map((item) => (
{item.imageUrl ? ( // eslint-disable-next-line @next/next/no-img-element ) : (
)}

{item.name}

{formatCurrency(item.price)}

))}
) : (
Browse the store to build your viewing history.
)}
{/* Right Column (Wishlist & Shortcuts) */}

Wishlist

View All
{wishlistItems.length > 0 ? (
{wishlistItems.slice(0, 3).map((item) => (
{item.imageUrl && ( // eslint-disable-next-line @next/next/no-img-element )}

{item.name}

{formatCurrency(item.price)}

))}
) : (
Your wishlist is ready for the next drop.
)}

Shortcuts

{[ { href: '/account/addresses', icon: MapPin, label: 'Addresses' }, { href: '/account/settings#payments', icon: CreditCard, label: 'Payments' }, { href: '/account/returns', icon: RefreshCcw, label: 'Returns' }, { href: '/account/notifications', icon: Bell, label: 'Alerts' } ].map((link) => ( {link.label} ))}
{/* Logout Button */}
{/* Scrollbar CSS */}
) }

messages.message:
Error: Calling setState synchronously within an effect can trigger cascading renders

Effects are intended to synchronize state between React and external systems such as manually updating the DOM, state management libraries, or other platform APIs. In general, the body of an effect should do one or both of the following:
* Update external systems with the latest state from React.
* Subscribe for updates from some external system, calling setState in a callback function when external state changes.

Calling setState synchronously within an effect body causes cascading renders that can hurt performance, and is not recommended. (https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect).
